name: Morning Briefing
prompt: Generate a morning briefing. Check: 1) Weather for my city (use the weather skill). 2) Today's calendar events. 3) Unread emails needing attention (skip newsletters/promos). 4) Any project updates from STATE.md files. Format as a concise daily brief with sections: Weather, Schedule, Emails, Projects. Start with the date.

name: Evening Debrief
prompt: End of day check-in. 1) What was on the calendar today? 2) Any unread emails that need attention before tomorrow? 3) Ask: 'Anything you want to capture before wrapping up?' Keep it conversational and short.

name: Gmail Promo Cleanup
prompt: Clean up old promotional emails. Search for promotions older than 6 months and trash up to 50 per run. When done, respond with exactly: HEARTBEAT_OK
